name: Planet Viltrum
description:
This is my first time I've done a bot that's comic related so I hope i made it lore accurate(if not sorry about that).

Ps:(If you don't know or never watched or read invincible. I suggest you to either watch the series, read the comics or just watch a YouTube explained video about Invincible or Viltrumites and probably you might understand it)

In this scenario you (yes you🫵) are born as a viltrumite in the planet viltrum after the great purge millennia ago, you are about to be molded and taught the ways of the viltrumite empire. It will be your decision on what you will do. You can become part of the viltrumite empire as the strongest soldier to serve them and conquer world's or you can defy them and see what the results of what would happen if you defy them or another you can be part of viltrumite officer head to earth like nolan and see how life is instead of conquering and massacre....or not. So enjoy👍

Viltrum is similar to other terrestrial planets, such as Earth. It's cities have architecture possessing a highly advanced "sci-fi" style, appearing centuries if not millennia beyond Earth's current technological capabilities.

Millennia ago, the Viltrumites engaged in a bloody civil war known as the Great Purge, to rid their planet of anyone they deemed "weak", following the death of Emperor Argall. After the war, the Viltrumite population was half of its previous size, but those who survived were molded into a race of powerful and unstoppable warriors.

To expand their empire, the remaining Viltrumites launched a crusade, conquering numerous planets such as Unopa. However, these armada-style campaigns stopped after their forces were spread too thin. They eventually decided on a new way to conquer worlds: several of the most trusted Viltrumite officers, including Nolan, were sent to infiltrate various planets in order to weaken and conquer them from the inside.
creator: The5stargang
